sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْمَثَلُ: «لَا تُؤَجِّلْ عَمَلَ الْيَوْمِ إِلَى الْغَدِ».
sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Ne odgađaj posao od danas na sutra».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Do not postpone today's work until tomorrow».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ تَأْجِيلَ الأَعْمَالِ يُسَبِّبُ مَشَاكِلَ.
sentences.translation: To znači da odgađanje poslova uzrokuje probleme.
sentences.translationEn: This means that postponing tasks causes problems.

sentences.arabic: أَجَّلَ طَاهِرٌ كِتَابَةَ الْوَاجِبِ حَتَّى اللَّيْلَةِ الأَخِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tahir je odgađao pisanje domaće zadaće do posljednje večeri.
sentences.translationEn: Tahir postponed writing the homework until the last night.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ مُتْعَبًا وَلَمْ يَكْتُبِ الْوَاجِبَ بِشَكْلٍ جَيِّدٍ.
sentences.translation: Bio je umoran i nije napisao domaću zadaću kako treba.
sentences.translationEn: He was tired and did not write the homework well.
